# Empirical domains

The research programme is grounded in operational data infrastructures and real-world knowledge systems, including:

- rights management and authority control;

- cultural heritage and GLAM knowledge graphs;

- graph federation and semantic interoperability;

- multilingual metadata integration;

- provenance-aware knowledge systems;

- semantic validation and review workflows.

These domains provide practical settings in which semantic stabilisation problems arise naturally and can be observed under realistic conditions.
